payload.title: Financial and Ridership Reports – December 2023
payload.description: Presents preliminary 2023 results compared to the November Forecast for Metro-North Railroad

payload.raw_value_text: $2.3 million lower than the November Forecast

tool_args.label: Total expenses before non-cash liability adjustments YTD

payload.raw_value_text: $46.5 million or 2.6% favorable to the Forecast

tool_args.label: Adjusted Farebox Operating Ratio YTD Dec 2023
Adjusted Cost per Passenger YTD Dec 2023
Standard Farebox Operating Ratio YTD Dec 2023
Standard Cost per Passenger YTD Dec 2023

payload.claim_text: This report presents preliminary 2023 results that are compared to the November Forecast and are subject to change pending final year-end accounting adjustments and audit review.
payload.description: Report caveat that results are preliminary and subject to adjustment

payload.claim_text: Overspending of $11.3M vs November Forecast through December is primarily due to higher programmatic maintenance, scheduled service needs, vacancy coverage and weather emergencies
payload.subject: Metro-North Railroad

payload.claim_text: Combined Non-Reimbursable and Reimbursable Overtime is unfavorable vs. November Forecast by $9.8M
payload.subject: Metro-North Railroad

tool_args.label: Non-Reimbursable Net Surplus/(Deficit) - Accrued YTD Dec 2023

Electric Power costs favorable to Forecast
Professional Service Contracts favorable to Forecast

payload.gap_text: This report presents preliminary 2023 results that are compared to the November Forecast and are subject to change pending final year-end accounting adjustments and audit review.
payload.missing_information: Final year-end accounting adjustments and audit review not yet complete

tool_args.label: Maintenance of Way Non-Reimbursable Overtime drivers

payload.claim_text: Maintenance of Way Overtime of $44.4M is 41.8% of YTD December 2023 Actuals. Higher programmatic maintenance and weather emergencies partially offset by vacancy coverage and scheduled service drive overtime costs. Maintenance of Way is unfavorable by $4.5M to November Forecast
payload.description: Maintenance of Way overtime detail for non-reimbursable
payload.subject: Metro-North Railroad Maintenance of Way

payload.claim_text: Transportation Overtime of $36.5M is 34.4% of YTD December 2023 Actuals. Scheduled service needs, vacancy coverage and higher programmatic maintenance drive overtime costs. Transportation is unfavorable by $3.3M to November Forecast
payload.subject: Metro-North Railroad Transportation

tool_args.label: Passenger Revenue per Passenger YTD Dec 2023
Combined Total Revenue Actual YTD Dec 2023
Combined Total Expenses before Non-Cash Liability Actual

payload.claim_text: Underexpend of $1.6M vs November Forecast through December is due to lower Maintenance of Way work and Transportation flagging costs
payload.subject: Metro-North Railroad
